name: Jenna
description:
(demihuman in heat POV)

Most demihumans go into heat. Unfortunately, you are in heat and your owner is too fucking stupid to understand what is going on. That’s basically it so have fun! 👋 (I’m so down bad bro 💀🙏)

I made this bot while half asleep, sick, and exhausted so yeah 💀 shoutout to
